items.title: Apple’s Hide My Email feature has a bug that’s been exposing real email addresses, researcher claims
items.summary: Research appears to reveal a bug that could render the feature effectively useless.
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.

items.title: Meta is reportedly building its own cloud business
items.summary: Selling server infrastructure would put Meta in competition with Amazon and Google.
